label: Auto (Model Best)
desc: Uses the strongest default look for the selected template and scene intent.

label: Cinematic Realism
desc: Photoreal cinema with premium lighting and believable detail.
prompt: Photoreal cinematic realism with natural skin detail, physically plausible lighting, clean lens behavior, strong depth separation, and premium film color grade.

label: Commercial Polish
desc: High-end ad clarity with glossy production value.
prompt: High-end commercial look with crisp ad-grade detail, controlled highlights, clean background separation, premium retouching discipline, and polished brand-ready finish.

label: Moody Noir
desc: Dark contrast, dramatic shadow, precise low-key mood.
prompt: Moody low-key cinematic style with rich shadow contrast, restrained highlights, elegant darkness, dramatic realism, and tension-forward composition.

label: Bright Lifestyle
desc: Clean, modern, naturally lit premium social visuals.
prompt: Bright modern lifestyle aesthetic with soft natural light, inviting color balance, realistic textures, premium editorial framing, and clean optimistic energy.

label: Anamorphic Blockbuster
desc: Wide-scale feature-film spectacle with lens character.
prompt: Epic anamorphic blockbuster look with wide-screen scale, cinematic lens bloom, controlled flares, premium production design, and high-impact theatrical color.

label: Prestige Drama
desc: Refined prestige-TV framing with emotional realism.
prompt: Prestige drama visual language with intimate framing, elegant practical lighting, realistic texture, restrained color, and emotionally grounded cinematic composition.

label: Handheld Urgent
desc: Documentary urgency and kinetic realism.
prompt: Urgent handheld documentary style with kinetic framing, realistic motion energy, harsh practical light, immediate realism, and grounded observational tension.

label: Raw Indie Film
desc: Natural texture, honest lighting, indie-film grit.
prompt: Raw indie film aesthetic with honest natural lighting, subtle grit, grounded texture, imperfect realism, and emotionally direct cinematic framing.

label: Golden Hour Doc
desc: Warm documentary light with premium natural color.
prompt: Golden hour documentary look with warm directional sunlight, realistic environmental texture, soft atmospheric depth, and premium natural-color storytelling.

label: Neon Cyberpunk
desc: Electric night-city atmosphere with bold contrast.
prompt: Neon cyberpunk atmosphere with rain-slick reflections, electric magenta and cyan accents, bold urban contrast, layered haze, and premium futuristic production design.

label: Dystopian Future
desc: Severe futuristic worldbuilding with hard-edged tone.
prompt: Dystopian future worldbuilding with industrial scale, severe geometry, atmospheric haze, hardened textures, bleak cinematic palette, and tense speculative realism.

label: Luxury Editorial
desc: Premium fashion/editorial gloss and restraint.
prompt: Luxury editorial aesthetic with immaculate styling, expensive materials, sculpted light, premium restraint, elegant negative space, and refined fashion-magazine finish.

label: Startup Minimal
desc: Sharp founder-brand visuals with clean product focus.
prompt: Startup minimal visual language with clean geometry, bright controlled lighting, product-forward composition, tasteful tech branding cues, and crisp modern simplicity.

label: Finance Network
desc: Broadcast-ready finance and markets presentation.
prompt: Finance-network visual treatment with sharp studio lighting, premium broadcast graphics feel, confident authority, sleek screens, and polished business-news realism.

label: Sports Broadcast
desc: High-energy sports package look.
prompt: Sports-broadcast visual style with bold contrast, dramatic arena lighting, athletic impact framing, premium motion-graphics energy, and competitive spectacle.

label: Technical Blueprint
desc: Clear engineered diagrams and product anatomy.
prompt: Technical blueprint presentation with precise linework, layered exploded-view clarity, cool engineering tones, readable structure, and premium industrial-design detail.

label: Medical Cutaway
desc: Clinical educational anatomy and internal detail.
prompt: Clinical medical cutaway style with clean anatomical accuracy, layered internal visibility, premium educational rendering, sterile lighting, and high-information scientific clarity.

label: National Geographic
desc: Natural-world documentary photography and scale.
prompt: Natural-history documentary aesthetic with rich environmental detail, realistic scale, clean natural light, premium nature-magazine color, and awe-driven composition.

label: Macro Biology
desc: Hyper-detailed scientific close-up imagery.
prompt: Macro biology look with hyper-detailed organic texture, scientific precision, dramatic close focus, clean lab-grade clarity, and vivid educational realism.

label: Architecture Digest
desc: Interior and structural luxury publication look.
prompt: Architecture editorial style with elegant structural lines, tasteful premium interiors, clean daylight balance, refined materials, and design-magazine sophistication.

label: Brutalist Editorial
desc: Hard geometry, bold contrast, modern edge.
prompt: Brutalist editorial aesthetic with hard geometric shapes, stark contrast, severe composition, monochrome discipline, and fashion-forward modern edge.

label: Swiss Poster
desc: Grid-driven typography and clean visual order.
prompt: Swiss poster design language with disciplined grid composition, clean hierarchy, minimal color, crisp shapes, and high-clarity graphic balance.

label: Bauhaus Graphic
desc: Primary shapes, bold layouts, iconic modernism.
prompt: Bauhaus-inspired graphic look with primary-color geometry, bold asymmetry, minimalist visual storytelling, sharp poster energy, and modernist clarity.

label: Graphic Novel Ink
desc: Heavy ink, dramatic linework, mature comic tone.
prompt: Graphic novel ink rendering with bold shadow masses, confident linework, dramatic panel composition, gritty comic-book atmosphere, and high-impact storytelling.

label: Manga Inkwash
desc: High-contrast manga energy with painterly brushwork.
prompt: Manga inkwash style with dynamic line energy, expressive brush textures, bold black-and-white contrast, cinematic panel drama, and emotionally charged illustration.

label: Anime Feature
desc: Premium anime-film finish and depth.
prompt: Feature-quality anime style with polished shading, cinematic composition, expressive character design, rich background painting, and premium animated-film finish.

label: Anime Pastel
desc: Soft anime palette with dreamy atmosphere.
prompt: Soft pastel anime aesthetic with airy lighting, gentle gradients, dreamy emotional warmth, expressive faces, and clean premium illustration finish.

label: Western Animation
desc: Studio-cartoon storytelling with strong readability.
prompt: Western animated-feature look with readable shapes, expressive posing, polished color scripting, strong silhouette language, and premium family-film clarity.

label: Toon Pop
desc: Bold social-friendly cartoon impact.
prompt: Bold toon-pop style with saturated color, playful exaggeration, crisp outlines, clean modern cartoon finish, and high-click visual punch.

label: Stylized 3D
desc: Modern stylized CGI with readable forms.
prompt: Stylized 3D CGI with clean topology, premium shader control, expressive forms, studio-quality lighting, and polished animated-world readability.

label: Unreal Cinematic
desc: Real-time cinematic 3D with premium game-engine finish.
prompt: Unreal-engine cinematic look with physically based rendering, dramatic volumetrics, high-end environment detail, premium real-time lighting, and polished 3D spectacle.

label: Documentary 3D
desc: Premium 3D business-documentary scenes with clean composition.
prompt: Elite faceless YouTube documentary 3D look with obviously computer-generated design, polished CGI materials, miniature-world systems, matte-black void staging, clean white-gray environments, controlled red accent highlights, bold focal hierarchy, product-shot hero objects, map and mechanism cutaways, infographic readability, and cinematic motion-graphics energy. Not live-action photography, not generic medical textbook rendering, not cluttered lab repetition.

label: Clay Render
desc: Soft tactile materials and handcrafted charm.
prompt: Clay-render aesthetic with tactile sculpted materials, soft bounce light, handcrafted imperfections, warm stop-motion charm, and premium stylized depth.

label: Toy Photography
desc: Miniature realism with controlled macro drama.
prompt: Toy-photography look with miniature-world realism, shallow depth of field, tactile materials, dramatic macro lighting, and playful premium detail.

label: Low Poly World
desc: Graphic 3D worlds with clean shapes.
prompt: Low-poly worldbuilding with intentional geometry, graphic lighting, clean color blocking, readable 3D composition, and stylish simplified environments.

label: Isometric Render
desc: Readable angled worlds and systems views.
prompt: Isometric 3D render with clear spatial storytelling, precise modular detail, polished lighting, readable systems design, and premium architectural clarity.

label: Storybook Painterly
desc: Illustrated storybook warmth and atmosphere.
prompt: Painterly storybook illustration with soft textured brushwork, warm narrative atmosphere, whimsical detail, rich environment design, and emotionally inviting color.

label: Watercolor Dream
desc: Soft bleeding color and airy poetic mood.
prompt: Watercolor dreamscape with gentle pigment blooms, translucent layers, poetic softness, delicate edges, and refined storybook atmosphere.

label: Gouache Editorial
desc: Matte painted surfaces with magazine clarity.
prompt: Gouache editorial style with matte painted surfaces, crisp shape design, sophisticated color relationships, premium illustration clarity, and tactile brush texture.

label: Oil Paint Epic
desc: Grand painted drama and rich classical texture.
prompt: Epic oil-paint rendering with rich impasto texture, dramatic classical lighting, painterly depth, monumental composition, and museum-grade visual grandeur.

label: Colored Pencil Story
desc: Warm handcrafted lines and textured shading.
prompt: Colored-pencil storytelling style with warm hand-drawn texture, layered shading, expressive lines, approachable craft feel, and detailed illustrated warmth.

label: Surrealist Dreamscape
desc: Dream logic, impossible forms, poetic scale.
prompt: Surreal dreamscape with impossible scale, elongated forms, uncanny stillness, poetic symbolism, desert-horizon atmosphere, and refined painterly strangeness.

label: Desert Mirage
desc: Heat haze, strange scale, mythic emptiness.
prompt: Desert mirage surrealism with radiant sunset gradients, vast emptiness, heat distortion, mythic silhouettes, long shadows, and elegant dreamlike alienness.

label: Occult Symbolist
desc: Mystic symbols, ceremonial mood, dark beauty.
prompt: Occult symbolist style with ceremonial geometry, mysterious iconography, candlelit contrast, velvety darkness, and ornate dreamlike metaphysical atmosphere.

label: Celestial Fantasy
desc: Mythic skies, luminous magic, divine scale.
prompt: Celestial fantasy with luminous skies, mythic grandeur, magical atmosphere, radiant color transitions, elevated heroic composition, and premium fantasy-world beauty.

label: Dark Fantasy
desc: Heavy mythic danger with ornate menace.
prompt: Dark fantasy style with gothic menace, weathered armor and stone, eerie light shafts, mythic danger, heavy atmosphere, and cinematic fantasy realism.

label: Gothic Ornate
desc: Rich ornament, cathedral drama, refined darkness.
prompt: Gothic ornate style with cathedral-scale architecture, rich ornament, elegant darkness, candlelit drama, dramatic verticality, and premium historical fantasy texture.

label: Renaissance Canvas
desc: Classical balance and painterly humanity.
prompt: Renaissance-inspired painting with balanced composition, warm chiaroscuro, humanistic expression, classical drapery, and museum-grade painterly realism.

label: Baroque Drama
desc: Intense chiaroscuro and grand classical movement.
prompt: Baroque drama with deep chiaroscuro, opulent visual movement, theatrical light, rich fabric detail, and emotionally heightened classical grandeur.

label: Woodblock Epic
desc: Graphic historical print energy and stylized motion.
prompt: Woodblock-inspired epic illustration with bold carved lines, flattened perspective, rich pattern rhythm, stylized movement, and historic printmaking character.

label: Retro 70s Film
desc: Warm grain, earthy palette, vintage cinema mood.
prompt: Seventies film look with warm grain, earthy color palette, vintage lenses, analog softness, and atmospheric period-cinema character.

label: Retro 80s Neon
desc: Bold neon nostalgia and glossy period style.
prompt: Eighties neon aesthetic with saturated glow, glossy surfaces, synth-era color, retro-futurist charm, and vibrant pop-culture energy.

label: Retro 90s Magazine
desc: Editorial pop texture and print-era cool.
prompt: Nineties magazine editorial look with flash-lit coolness, graphic layout energy, pop-color accents, analog print texture, and stylish cultural nostalgia.

label: Y2K Gloss
desc: Chrome-pop, gel lighting, internet-era shine.
prompt: Y2K gloss aesthetic with chrome accents, translucent materials, gel lighting, futuristic optimism, glossy pop styling, and early-digital glamour.

desc: Liquid metal shine and glossy futuristic impact.
prompt: Chrome hyperrealism with liquid-metal surfaces, sharp specular highlights, futuristic luxury, surreal reflective geometry, and premium high-impact polish.

label: Monochrome Fine Art
desc: Refined black-and-white tonal discipline.
prompt: Monochrome fine-art style with elegant tonal range, sculptural light, refined texture, photographic discipline, and timeless gallery-quality composition.

label: Social Hook
desc: Aggressive thumbnail-ready clarity and punch.
prompt: Social-first visual treatment with oversized readability, bold focal hierarchy, aggressive clarity, emotional emphasis, vivid contrast, and instant-click composition.

label: Streetwear Flash
desc: Fashion-forward flash photography with attitude.

label: Paranormal Found Footage
